description_long: This is a large, L-shaped desk with a modern industrial design, featuring a spacious wooden surface and a raised secondary shelf along one side. The desk is supported by a black metal frame with open sides and two lower shelves for additional storage or organization. The wood has a rich, medium-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal legs and shelf supports. The raised shelf is ideal for monitors or accessories, while the main surface provides ample workspace for writing, computers, or other tasks. The open frame design allows for legroom and easy access to the lower shelves. This desk is both functional and stylish, suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A large, L-shaped desk with a wood surface, black metal frame, and a raised shelf for monitors or accessories. It features open sides and two lower shelves for storage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shape, main surface, raised shelf, and both lower shelves clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main surface and the height of the raised shelf.
description_view_2: Opposite top-down angle emphasizing the length of the main desk and the open frame structure.
description_view_3: View from the end of the long side, showing the width of the desk and the open leg space beneath.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the raised shelf, intended for seating and primary interaction, while the open frame and lower shelves are accessible from the front and sides.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or multi-purpose office desk
